message:
Add E2E tests for load balancing strategies (rust_proxy-166)

Implements comprehensive E2E tests for load balancing:
- Single strategy selects highest-priority proxy
- Round-robin distributes requests evenly
- Weighted distribution proportionally routes traffic
- Unhealthy proxies excluded from selection
- Mock proxy request logging verification
- FailAfter behavior for failover testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
